entry.title: Community project: General purpose customizing table
entry.content:
Use case

If there is a need for new customizing parameters in customer projects, we usually create tables, views, view clusters, access routines and so on. What if we used one single table for this? We would have an unique access module and could store as many parameters as we want using an access key.

Real-life experiences

I used this approach for many years in a mid-range implementation with about 3000 Users. It makes the developing more straightforward when it comes to use settings stored in the database. After 4 years, about 250 different parameter keys accumulated in our generic table. In case we have special requirements such as proper validation of values against domains or check tables, we continue using normal customizing features, but in case of simple setup parameters, the generic table is very helpful.

Features

  • General customizing tables
  • Possibility to set validity dates and user ids (for testing)
  • Usage with our without change requests (customizing or non-customizing)
  • Possibility to store structure-like parameters
  • Possibility to store multi-value parameters 

Learn more on the github readme

entry.title: Re: Success factors Compensation and Bonus configurations
entry.content: Hi Xavier, I have 2 questions, pls help.I can see maximum pay range in work sheet but cant see minimum pay Range.As this column I am pulling from look up table.Look table formula is ok,4 input and 2 out put as minimum pay range and maximum pay range. second question is market bench mark field wanted to make as editable in executive review.Thanking you.

entry.title: SAP EWA automated Analysis and tracker
entry.content:
My query to Microsoft Co-pilot


I have unstructured data with dynamic information on the SAP EWA Report. Each EWA Report contains Alert Overview and alert over view points contains critical issues and recommendations. Each Critical or recommendations under alert overview will have a hyperlinks which takes you to detailed information, where SAP provides issues, findings on tabular format and also recommendations. each week EWA REport contains different issues and different recommendations. Automated EWA report and summarise the issues, findings and recommendations on tabular format using any AI Tool like Azure GenAI, Python, Github Copilot etc., wanted to leverage GENAI.

Detailed Proposal for Automating SAP EWA Report Summarization

Objective
To automate the extraction, summarization, and presentation of critical issues, findings, and recommendations from SAP EWA Reports using AI tools like Azure GenAI, Python, and GitHub Copilot.

Tools and Technologies Required
1. Python Libraries:
o BeautifulSoup: For web scraping and parsing HTML content.
o PyPDF2 or pdfplumber: For extracting text from PDF documents.
o re (Regular Expressions): For pattern matching and text extraction.
o SpaCy or NLTK: For natural language processing tasks.
o Pandas: For data manipulation and creating tabular data.
o Matplotlib or Seaborn: For data visualization.

2. Azure Cognitive Services:
o Azure Text Analytics: For entity recognition, key phrase extraction, and sentiment analysis.
o Azure OpenAI: For leveraging pre-trained language models to summarize and generate insights.

3. Machine Learning Frameworks:
o TensorFlow or PyTorch: For developing custom machine learning models.

4. Automation and Integration Tools:
o GitHub Copilot: For code suggestions and assistance in writing scripts.
o Azure Functions: For automating the workflow and scheduling tasks.

5. Visualization and Reporting Tools:
o Power BI: For creating interactive dashboards and reports.

Step-by-Step Implementation Plan

1. Data Extraction:
o Web Scraping: Use BeautifulSoup to scrape HTML content from the EWA reports if they are web-based.
o PDF Parsing: Use PyPDF2 or pdfplumber to extract text from PDF reports.
o Pattern Matching: Use regular expressions to identify and extract hyperlinks, critical issues, and recommendations.
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
import requests
import re

# Example of web scraping
url = 'http://example.com/ewa_report'
response = requests.get(url)
soup = BeautifulSoup(response.content, 'html.parser')

# Extract hyperlinks
links = soup.find_all('a', href=True)
for link in links:
print(link['href'])

# Extract critical issues and recommendations
text = soup.get_text()
critical_issues = re.findall(r'Critical Issue: (.*?)\n', text)
recommendations = re.findall(r'Recommendation: (.*?)\n', text)
2. Natural Language Processing (NLP):
o Entity Recognition: Use Azure Text Analytics or SpaCy to identify entities and key phrases.
o Summarization: Use pre-trained models from Azure OpenAI to summarize the extracted text.
import spacy
from azure.ai.textanalytics import TextAnalyticsClient
from azure.core.credentials import AzureKeyCredential

# Example of using SpaCy for entity recognition
nlp = spacy.load('en_core_web_sm')
doc = nlp(text)
for ent in doc.ents:
print(ent.text, ent.label_)

# Example of using Azure Text Analytics
credential = AzureKeyCredential("your_key")
client = TextAnalyticsClient(endpoint="your_endpoint", credential=credential)
response = client.extract_key_phrases([text])
key_phrases = response[0].key_phrases
3. Machine Learning Models:
o Custom Models: Develop and fine-tune models using TensorFlow or PyTorch to classify and summarize the data.
import tensorflow as tf
from tensorflow.keras.models import Sequential
from tensorflow.keras.layers import Dense, LSTM

# Example of a simple LSTM model
model = Sequential()
model.add(LSTM(128, input_shape=(timesteps, features)))
model.add(Dense(1, activation='sigmoid'))
model.compile(optimizer='adam', loss='binary_crossentropy', metrics=['accuracy'])

# Train the model (example)
model.fit(X_train, y_train, epochs=10, batch_size=32)
4. Automation and Integration:
o GitHub Copilot: Use Copilot to assist in writing and optimizing code.
o Azure Functions: Automate the workflow to run weekly and process new reports.
import azure.functions as func

def main(req: func.HttpRequest) -> func.HttpResponse:
# Your code to process the EWA report
return func.HttpResponse("Report processed successfully.")
5. Visualization and Reporting:
o Pandas and Matplotlib: Create tables and visualizations to present the summarized data.
o Power BI: Develop interactive dashboards to provide insights.
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Create DataFrame
data = {'Issue': critical_issues, 'Recommendation': recommendations}
df = pd.DataFrame(data)

# Plot data
df.plot(kind='bar')
plt.show()

Programming Knowledge Required

1. Python: Proficiency in Python is essential for data extraction, parsing, NLP, and machine learning tasks.
2. Web Scraping: Knowledge of web scraping techniques using BeautifulSoup.
3. PDF Parsing: Familiarity with libraries like PyPDF2 or pdfplumber.
4. Regular Expressions: Understanding of regular expressions for pattern matching.
5. NLP: Experience with NLP libraries like SpaCy or NLTK.
6. Machine Learning: Skills in developing and fine-tuning models using TensorFlow or PyTorch.
7. Azure Services: Knowledge of Azure Cognitive Services and Azure Functions.
8. Data Visualization: Proficiency in data manipulation and visualization using Pandas, Matplotlib, and Power BI.

CHATGPT and COPILOT Conclusion
It is very much possible to automate the summarization of SAP EWA Reports using the tools and techniques outlined above. By following this detailed proposal and leveraging the required programming knowledge, your development team can successfully automate the process and present the information in a structured, tabular format.
Anyone has done any automation of EWA Report Analysis and tracker?

Is there please any trick how to get to these attributes with SCIM API?

I also cannot see this attribute available in the 'Manage Workforce SCIM API Attributes' action in SuccessFactors.

Kind regards,

Martin Pösinger, ADP

entry.title: SAP Community Meetup Lingen
entry.content:
Calling all tech enthusiasts in the SAP world!

 Join us for an evening of networking, mingling, and tech talk at our casual after-work event! 

 Whether you're a programmer, an SAP expert, or simply tech-curious, this is your chance to connect with like-minded SAP professionals in a relaxed setting. 

 

  Date: 27.03.2025

  Time: 19.30 Uhr

 Location: Alte Posthalterei, Große Str. 1, 49808 Lingen (Ems), Deutschland

Get ready for an evening filled with stimulating conversations, and the opportunity to expand your SAP network. 

 Bring your ideas, questions, and business cards – you never know who you might meet! Don't miss out on the chance to unwind, connect, and discover new opportunities in the SAP world. RSVP now to secure your spot!

entry.title: Is it possible to do a full data refresh in a Sandbox client from a Production client?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am looking to fully refresh all data in our Sandbox system with Production data.  A key part of the refresh is to only have planning objects in the Sandbox that are in Production (so deleting any planning object that does not exist in production).  We had an issue in the early days of our system where we had bad planning objects that we have cleaned up in production but they still remain in the Sandbox.  Essentially we would like a process to mirror production into the sandbox, is there a way of doing this? 

Thanks,

Jez

entry.title: Re: How to know how the upgrade was done ?
entry.content:
Basically, your systems are not at the same service package level, so the class or some of its components are different.

It seems someone forgot or chose not to complete an upgrade a few years ago...

  • until SAPK-74012INSAPUI (2015) complete
  • SAPK-74013INSAPUI to SAPK-74017INSAPUI (2016) in progress

entry.title: Re: CDSView:Service Contract Partner Information
entry.content:
Hello,

To create a Custom CDS View for integrating information about the address and name of the partner in a Service Contract, you can use the CDS View I_CustMgmtPartner. Virtual Data Model and CDS Views - Customer Management Partner This view provides partner data for all relevant OneOrder Business objects. When dealing with a service contract, it returns the partners stored at the header and relevant item levels, including those inherited from the header.

Steps to Create Custom CDS View:

  1. Create Custom CDS View:

    • Use the ‘Extensibility’ group in SAP S/4HANA Cloud to navigate to ‘Custom CDS Views’.
    • Choose I_CustMgmtPartner as your primary data source.
    • Define associations if needed with additional data sources.

  2. Select Required Fields:

    • Add fields such as CustMgmtPartner, CustMgmtPartnerFunction, and any necessary partner address fields.

  3. Publish:

    • Ensure the new CDS View is marked for external API consumption if needed.

  4. Use in API:

    • Once published, your view can be utilized via API by setting up appropriate communication scenarios and arrangements.

By following these steps, you will be able to create a CDS View to handle integration via API for service contract partner information.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: 🟣 Boost Development with GenAI in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: Where on the roadmap can we find the GenAI functionality?

entry.title: Re: Process Rating in Collaboration Hub
entry.content:
Good day rada_sereseanu,

 

Thank you for sharing your question on the SAP Community.  To provide further support in regard to your question, we recommend you create a support case using SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password).  

You will need to select the specific SAP Signavio product / component as shown in the example below.

 

System:  

Search for SAP Signavio   

 

Product Area:  

SAP Signavio Process Manager > SAP Signavio Process Manager  

 

Component:  

BPI (Business Process Intelligence)  

---  

BPI-PI (SAP Signavio Process Insights) or  

BPI-SIG (SAP Business Transformation Suite by SAP Signavio) – Product & Topic  

 

For further information you can find more details in the SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center .

 

Kind regards,

KantriceD

entry.title: Trigger CPI Integration for admin task not from ISC
entry.content:
We are investigating a way to simplify retry mechanism in SuccessFactors integrations.

we would like to know if there is a way thru integration Center to trigger CPI Integration.

Unfortunately, we have only found to do so when using Intelligent service Suite (ISC) but no option is left to trigger a cpi integration when admin task is required .

can you confirm that ? 

 

Thanks

Philippe

entry.title: Re: Sap script excel selecionar próxima linha vazia.
entry.content:
Bom dia!
Não sei se ainda precisa da resposta, mas eu estava com o mesmo problema descrito por você e consegui recentemente o código abaixo e para o meu caso deu certo.
O código eu consegui no ChatGPT e depois eu ajustei algumas coisas.



' Encontrar a primeira linha vazia para adicionar um novo e-mail
i = 0
Do While True
On Error Resume Next
Dim emailAtual As String
emailAtual = session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/tblSAPLSZA6T_CONTROL6/txtADSMTP-SMTP_ADDR[0," & i & "]").Text

' Se encontrar um campo vazio, insere o novo e-mail
If Err.Number <> 0 Or emailAtual = "" Then
On Error GoTo 0
Exit Do
End If
i = i + 1 ' Avança para a próxima linha
Loop

' Inserir o novo e-mail na primeira linha disponível
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/tblSAPLSZA6T_CONTROL6/txtADSMTP-SMTP_ADDR[0," & i & "]").Text = Cells(linha, 2).Value '"ADM@xxxx.COM.BR"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/tblSAPLSZA6T_CONTROL6/txtADSMTP-REMARK[3," & i & "]").Text = Cells(linha, 3).Value '"FINANCEIRO"

entry.title: Re: How to know how the upgrade was done ?
entry.content:
You could identify the OSS Notes that changed the class, but as your development system is already at a higher SP, you cannot implement them in that system.

So you could create a Transport of Copies request for the whole class, but first do a where-used search to make sure that no other Workbench object that uses this class will fail after the import, you would need to transport those changed objects as well, and again look for the usage case and add new objects to the request until no more objects are added.

entry.title: Issue with Transportation Route Proposal in Export Documents
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are currently facing the following situation:

At present, when the consignee and the ultimate consignee are located in different countries, the transportation route in an export document only reflects the departure country and the country of the ultimate consignee. The consignee’s country is not taken into account.
This means the route currently appears as: (Departure Country - Ultimate Consignee's Country).

However, if the consignee and ultimate consignee are in different countries, the route should instead be displayed as:
(Departure Country - Consignee's Country - Ultimate Consignee's Country).

We have already looked into the BAdI /SAPSLL/BADI_CDOC_PROP_N to see if this could be achieved by manipulating the header data in the data proposal logic. Unfortunately, this does not seem to be possible for the route topic.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue or found an alternative approach to solving this?

Thanks in advance for any insights!

Best wishes

entry.title: Can't find our code for GB Security Training in the Dynamic Business Event Menu.
entry.content:
Hi 

I am a student at Ubon Ratchathani University. I study in the Business school, majoring in Accounting, Year 2. I have taken a course that uses the SAP program. Right now, I am working on the HCM module in Step 12 Create event. When I followed the instructions as follows:

"You can see the Business Event Menu for the current plan. There, please
choose GB Training and Education  Security Training and select GB
Security Training. Then choose the menu path Menu ► Business Event ►
Dates ► Create Without Resource."

But I can't find my code, which should be '070 ST'. No matter how hard I look for mt code, I can't find it. I didn't make any mistakes in the previous steps, but now I'm stuck at step 12.

I would like to know how I can solve the problem. Please

Best regards

entry.title: SAP Sustainability Data Exchange: New Partner Resources
entry.content:
SDX Now Has a Dedicated PartnerEdge Page! 

We’re thrilled to announce the launch of SDX’s official PartnerEdge page – a one-stop hub designed to provide SAP partners with essential insights, enablement materials, and go-to-market resources. This page makes it easier than ever to position SDX in customer conversations and accelerate adoption.

📬 What You’ll Find on the SDX PartnerEdge Page:

Sales and technical enablement assets – Equip yourself with the right tools to engage customers.
Customer success stories – See how SDX is making an impact in real-world scenarios.
SDX value propositions for different industries – Tailor your approach for various customer needs.

📚Bookmark the page today and stay updated on the latest SDX developments!
👉 Visit the SDX PartnerEdge Page

🔎 Partner Learning – Empowering Our Ecosystem

Partner enablement is key to scaling SDX adoption, and we’re excited to introduce the SDX Partner Update  – a live learning session to give you the opportunity ask questions on how to successfully position, sell, and implement SDX.

📅 Date & Time: March 25, 2025 | 10:00 AM CET (GMT+1) | 🕒 Duration: 1 hour

🔑 Sign up today! 

Make sure your partners don’t miss out—share this learning opportunity and set them up for success!

SAP Sustainability Data Exchange is shaping the future of sustainability data sharing, and with these new resources, our partners are empowered to lead the way.

**************************

Jessica Bartels, Product Marketing Lead - SAP Sustainability Data Exchange

 

#sapsustainabiltydataexchange

entry.title: Re: Customer maintainance of your PO Responsible and contact that receives the CPI notification
entry.content:
hi there.

PO Responsible Maintenance is the person who will receive the Purchase Order notifications for Maintenance. These go out in September/October. Followed by 5 reminders one per month, unless you have already entered your PO information.  PO responsible Cloud is the person who will receive the Purchase Order notifications for Cloud.   

Maintenance Responsible is the person who we believe will receive the CPI notification, that occurs mid year.

A person can have have many roles eg. they can be PO Resp MT, and PO Resp CL and also MT Responsible. 

You can have multiple people in your company that can have each role.

You cannot create your own custom roles

In August 2025, we are aiming to introduce Accounts Payable and E Bill.  And at the end of the year, we will also have Main/business lead; Technical/Onboarding lead and Invoice Recipient.

i will keep the blog updated.

thanks for your interest

entry.title: Re: Planned Goods issue date in outbound delivery and Goo...
entry.content:
Hi @ttsuboi1106 ,

"Could help us to understand why Delv2 has Feb 19, 2025 in Planned GI was proposed in outbound delivery instead of Feb 18, 2025?" - > System is not copied due to various factors influence example I guess system see requested delivery then calculate forward/ backward... Please see the link below for the details and let us know if any further questions. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/c7894a248ca14f74aca67f97528e5ad7/9dbdba53422bb54ce10000000a174cb4.html

If you still wants influence as per your need, then you have to do with enhancement.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Usage of Quantity Based- Inspection Point in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have requirement of customer i.e. they will check the quality parameters of 2 pipes of each 100 pipes produced/manufactured during Inprocess Inspection, we have tried with Inspection Point but found that Quantity Based - Inspection Point is not available in Public Cloud.

How can we achieve the same it Public Cloud or if any alternative rather than Inspection Point to check this point of Quality.

Please Help 

 

Thanks and regards,

Raj Tilak

entry.title: Re: Logical Port Operation not updating
entry.content:
We have a simular issue on our ECC system...Development all good but once in production, the new operations are visible in Design Time but not updated in Runtime.

Did you manage to solve the issue?

entry.title: Unable to find the Solution to Check Quality Parameter in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

The customer's requirement is that whenever 100 units are produced, a quality check must be performed on 2 pieces. For example, if the lot size is 800, the system should give provision to record results of 4 separate samples, each containing 2 pieces.

We tried using the Sampling Scheme, but the system is allowing inspection of all 8 pieces within a single inspection lot instead of generating separate samples.

I believe this can be achieved using Quantity-Based Inspection Points, but this functionality is not available in SAP Public Cloud.

Does anyone know how to configure this in Public Cloud or suggest an alternative solution?

 

 

Please Help

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Delay Learning Assignments
entry.content: Is there any movement on this? I also have a request to assign a specific item to new hires 90 days after they start

entry.title: Re: Rewards & Recognition: Guidelines formula
entry.content:
Hi @analousada - So the guidelines provide the various amounts based on the selected categories/levels. If we wanted to have this guideline amount or any manually entered amount by the nominator to be a % of salary, then this will also work.

In the end, the initial nominated award amount is 2 but we are changing this amount to be current salary multiplied by 2. We can adjust the rule to be from the amount amount rather than guideline.

Thanks!

entry.title: 🇨🇭 Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, AEM (Risch-Rotkreuz, Switzerland)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam instance will be about Event-driven integration using SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh. Join us for this 5-hour event of developer networking and hands-on learning in Risch-Rotkreuz, Switzerland.

We will achieve an integration scenario like the one in the diagram below by the end of the CodeJam.

If you are interested in knowing what we will develop during the event, check out the Event-Driven Integrations with SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh GitHub repo -  https://github.com/SAP-samples/event-driven-integrations-codejam. The repository contains the details of the integration scenario we will go through during the event.

This free, hands-on, in-person event (not virtual) will take place on Thursday, May 23rd 2025, in Risch-Rotkreuz, Switzerland at GAMBIT Consulting AG office (8th floor) .

The instructors for this event are Developer Advocate @ajmaradiaga and @Dan_Wroblewski . 

There are essential prerequisites that every attendee must complete before arriving at the event location. You can find the prerequisites here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/event-driven-integrations-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "Yes" button in the Will you be attending? box on this page.

Location: Gambit Consulting AG, Suurstoffi 22, 6343 Risch-Rotkreuz, Switzerland (8th floor)

entry.title: Re: How to search within specific object type (or other a...
entry.content:
I already tried CTRL+H and CTRL+SHIPT+A, but I don't see they are usefull. The other options mentioned in the link are not relevant.

In my question I gave a short number of examples where I don't see I can use those two options.
For example I know I have a class that starts with ZCL in the object name and I know the the short texts contains "cat".

Can I find this class with CTRL+H or CTRL+SHIFT+A ?

Can I combine search criteria? 

  1. I want only to search classes
  2. The class name must start with ZCL
  3. The short text of the class must contain "cat"

Kind Regards Thomas

entry.title: Re: how to connect to ibm db2 as400 iseries using jt400.jar

entry.title: Import multiple bpmn to SAP Signavio

entry.title: Re: Best Practice for SAML Offline generator and local keystore with SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi, @lauraval 

I still don't have access to the file. Could you please check?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Settlements Management in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Thank you for that, I still don't understand one part. there is no VBOF any more, so how we can achive properly data in ACADOCA for delta accrual/delta settlement? In Rebate agreements, posting thanks to the VBOF transaction was done for each sales document. Currently (CCM) delta accrual is posted as 1 document

What I understand when I change % (and create a delta accrual document) in CO I will only get information at the payer level and possibly SKU. How do I get Sold To data i ACADOCA? top down in CO is not possible because below the payer there are several buing groups with different conditions. 

 

Best

Paulina

entry.title: 🇫🇷 Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh (Paris, France)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam instance will be about Event-driven integration using SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh. Join us for this 5-hour event of developer networking and hands-on learning in Paris, France.

We will achieve an integration scenario like the one in the diagram below by the end of the CodeJam.

If you are interested in knowing what we will develop during the event, check out the Event-Driven Integrations with SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh GitHub repo -  https://github.com/SAP-samples/event-driven-integrations-codejam. The repository contains the details of the integration scenario we will go through during the event.

This free, hands-on, in-person event (not virtual) will take place on Tuesday, June 10th 2025, in Paris, France at TBD.

The instructors for this event is Developer Advocate @ajmaradiaga and @Dan_Wroblewski . 

There are essential prerequisites that every attendee must complete before arriving at the event location. You can find the prerequisites here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/event-driven-integrations-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "Yes" button in the Will you be attending? box on this page.

Location: TBD

entry.title: Re: Error when performing Inventory Transfer
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Check the warehouse in all the lines of the document. In the warehouse, there is a field named "Branch". Its value must be the same as the branch assigned to the document.

 

Best regards

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM integration with Tricent for Test Automation on-premise
entry.content:
Hello SAP Cloud ALM Team

We don't have License for Tricentis Cloud, and we don't want to use it.

We have only on perm License. Could you please let me know how can we integrate Cloud ALM with Tricent on Prem.

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM integration with Tricent for Test Autom...
entry.content:
The SAP Cloud ALM setup guide page on Integrating Test Automation Providers outlines that only 2 types of Test Automation providers are currently supported. The Tricentis option applies only to the Cloud product which SAP Cloud ALM can provision. There is currently no option to integrate on-premise Tricentis products with SAP Cloud ALM. 

Note, the page Setting Up Tricentis Test Automation for SAP Integrated with SAP Cloud ALM in the same guide outlines that "Tricentis Test Automation for SAP integrated with SAP Cloud ALM is a joint cloud-based offering from SAP and Tricentis." The Questions and Answers document for ALM (Page 49, as of 2025.03.11) has information that outlines your entitlements to the Tricentis product via SAP Cloud ALM. In short, if you have an SAP Cloud ALM tenant you are likely also entitled to the Tricentis tenant.


If you wish to influence this and request additional Test Automation integrations, please log a request in the SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation campaign on the SAP Customer Influence portal.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business one
entry.content:
Dear @Saaad , 

adding on top of the great info already shared in the previous comments:

Here is the SAP Business One dedicated page on learning.com:

SAP Business One

Good luck,

Maya

entry.title: Exposing an OData-Service to the cloud using Integration Suite with OAuth 2.0
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am trying to expose an OData-Service from our On-Premise SAP System to the cloud using the Integration Suite. For authentication I want to use OAuth 2.0, the connection to the backend is accomplished using Basic Authentication.

To do that, I followed this blog. I created an API-Proxy which points to the local address vía Cloud Connector. Without any further configuration I am able to use this proxy as it should be.

I used the following Policies to accomplish my authentication case following the mentioned blog:

First I verify the token I provided 

<OAuthV2 async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
   <ExternalAuthorization>false</ExternalAuthorization>
   <Operation>VerifyAccessToken</Operation>
   <GenerateResponse enabled="true"/><SupportedGrantTypes/>
   <Tokens/>
</OAuthV2>

Then I remove the Authorization Header (following the blog; I don't understand why)

<AssignMessage async="false" continueOnError="true" enabled="true" xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
    <Remove>   
     	<Headers>      
			<Header name="Authorization"></Header>   
          </Headers>
     </Remove> 
	<IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
	<AssignTo createNew="false" type="request"></AssignTo>
</AssignMessage>

Then I grep my Backend-Credentials from a Key Value Map

<KeyValueMapOperations mapIdentifier="BackendUser" async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <Get assignTo="private.username">
		<Key>
		    <Parameter>username</Parameter>
		</Key>
	</Get>
    <Get assignTo="private.password">
         <Key>
             <Parameter>password</Parameter>
         </Key>
    </Get>
<Scope>apiproxy</Scope>
</KeyValueMapOperations>

And last, I use Basic Authentication to login to the backend

<BasicAuthentication async='true' continueOnError='false' enabled='true' xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>

	<Operation>Encode</Operation>
	<IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>

	<User ref='private.username'></User>

	<Password ref='private.password'></Password>

	<AssignTo createNew="false">request.header.Authorization</AssignTo>
</BasicAuthentication>

 I provide the token using another API Proxy pointing to nowhere, with OAuth v2.0 Policy to generate Access Tokens:

<OAuthV2 async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <Operation>GenerateAccessToken</Operation>
    <GenerateResponse/>
    <SupportedGrantTypes>
        <GrantType>client_credentials</GrantType>
    </SupportedGrantTypes>
</OAuthV2>

Both APIs are associated to the same product within the Integration Suite and I use the Application Key of an Application within that product as Client ID and the Application Secret as Client Secret to generate a Token, which I can use within Postman to send a request to my API. 

Unfortunately, I receive HTML-Code as a response, which tells me, that I am not authorized:

<html>

<head>
    <meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=windows-1252">
    <title>Anmeldung fehlgeschlagen</title>
    <style>
        body {
            background: #ffffff;
            text-align: center;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .content {
            display: table;
            position: absolute;
            width: 100%;
            height: 80%;
        }

        .valigned {
            display: table-cell;
            vertical-align: middle;
        }

        .lowerCenter {
            display: table-cell;
            vertical-align: bottom;
        }

        .footer {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            z-index: -1;
        }

        .footerLeft {
            float: left;
            margin-left: 20px;
        }

        .footerRight {
            float: right;
            margin-right: 20px;
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0px;
            right: 0px;
        }

        .centerText {
            font-style: normal;
            font-family: Arial;
            font-size: 26px;
            color: #444444;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .errorTextHeader {
            font-style: normal;
            font-family: Arial;
            font-size: 40px;
            color: #444444;
        }

        .bottomText {
            align: center;
            font-style: normal;
            font-family: Arial;
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #444444;
        }

        .biggerBottomText {
            align: center;
            font-style: normal;
            font-family: Arial;
            font-size: 16px;
            color: #444444;
        }

        .detailTable {
            align: bottom;
            vertical-align: middle;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
            font-style: normal;
            font-family: Arial;
            font-size: 16px;
            color: #444444;
        }
    </style>
</head>

<body>
    <div class="content">
        <div class="valigned">
            <p class="centerText"><span class="errorTextHeader"> 401 Nicht autorisiert </span></p>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="footer">
        <div class="footerLeft"><img width='150' height='80' title='' alt='SAP logo'src='data:image/png;base64,'>
        </div>
        <div class="footerRight">
            <p class="bottomText"><span class="biggerBottomText">©</span>2025 SAP SE, All rights reserved.</p>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>

</html>

When I use a wrong token, I receive 

{
    "fault": {
        "faultstring": "Invalid Access Token",
        "detail": {
            "errorcode": "keymanagement.service.invalid_access_token"
        }
    }
}

Which makes sense. 

If I use Basic Authentication alone within my policies, it works fine, which leads me to the conclusion that there is something wrong with the OAuth-Authentification or the combination of Basic and OAuth.

What am I missing in my setup or are there any other "easier" ways to accomplish what I am trying to do?

Thank you in advance,

Janik

entry.title: Re: Inquiry on SAP Solution for e-Invoicing Compliance in...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please have a look at the document and reporting compliance

What Is SAP Document and Reporting Compliance? | SAP Help Portal

Kind regards

Robert

entry.title: Re: Joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi @nageshcaparthy 

I hope you are well! During the configuration AI Joule I noticed that Booster did not create all required destinations: 

  • Joule Design time Destination
  • Joule Run time Destination
  • Runtime Default
  • Runtime Data

Only SAP S/4HANA SSO has been created by the Booster. Do you have any tips or advice on how to force Booster to re-create missing destinations?

Best regards,

Tomasz

entry.title: Crystal Report Runtime, trying to run report from vb.net website
entry.content:
I am trying to run a Crystal Report using Crystal Report Runtime in my vb.net website.  When the page loads into the browser, the report doesn't open.  I get no messages or errors, just an empty browser.  It behaves the same when I test it locally and on the server.  Why doesn't the runtime load the report?

Here's my source code in the .aspx file:

<%@ Page Language="vb" AutoEventWireup="false" CodeBehind="PrintEmergencyRpt.aspx.vb" Inherits="Security_Badge_Requests.PrintEmergencyRpt" %>

<%@ Register assembly="CrystalDecisions.Web, Version=13.0.4000.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=692fbea5521e1304" namespace="CrystalDecisions.Web" tagprefix="CR" %>

<!DOCTYPE html>

<html xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml">
<head runat="server">
<title>Crystal Report Viewer</title>
<style type="text/css">
.auto-style1 {}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<form id="form1" runat="server">
<div>
<CR:CrystalReportViewer ID="CrystalReportViewer1" runat="server" AutoDataBind="true" ReportSourceID="CrystalReportSource1" />
<CR:CrystalReportSource ID="CrystalReportSource1" runat="server">
<Report FileName="~\AccessGrants-Emergency_Response.rpt">
</Report>
</CR:CrystalReportSource>
<br />
<asp:Button ID="Button1" runat="server" CssClass="auto-style1" Text="Button" Width="109px" />
<br />
</div>
</form>
</body>
</html>

 

Here's the code in the aspx.vb file:

Imports CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine
Imports CrystalDecisions.Shared


Public Class PrintEmergencyRpt
Inherits System.Web.UI.Page

Protected Sub Page_init(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Init
Dim tbCurrent1 As CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine.Table
Dim tliCurrent1 As CrystalDecisions.Shared.TableLogOnInfo
Dim cr As New CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine.ReportDocument()

Try
'Map the actual path on the server to the report file
Dim strPath As String = Server.MapPath("AccessGrants-Emergency_Response.rpt")
'Load the report
cr.Load(strPath, CrystalDecisions.Shared.OpenReportMethod.OpenReportByTempCopy)

For Each tbCurrent1 In cr.Database.Tables
tliCurrent1 = tbCurrent1.LogOnInfo
With (tliCurrent1.ConnectionInfo)
.UserID = "xxxxx"
.Password = "xxxxxxxxx"
End With
tbCurrent1.ApplyLogOnInfo(tliCurrent1)
Next tbCurrent1

'Set the source for the report
CrystalReportViewer1.ReportSource = cr
Catch ex As Exception
Response.Write("The Following Error has occurred: " & ex.InnerException.ToString)
End Try

cr = Nothing
End Sub

Here are the added references and the file version:

Please help, I have tried different code from AI, but nothing works.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Join in DataSphere
entry.content:
Hello @Ganjos 

On the first glance I cannot recognize your joining key fields... but since you are using an inner join and you cannot see any results, it means that there are no matching keys in both tables.

If you want to "attach" the data from one table to the other, you need a left outer join.

Or you need to verify that the keys, which you want to join have the same data type and length.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: How to search within specific object type (or other a...
entry.content:
A more concrete example:

I found I can combine search on name zcl with type:clas to get below result, but I only want to see results where the short text contain the word Rental.How can I do that?

Hello @SANA11 

have you checked all the examples given in the SAC Help pages?

There you can find some examples around the topic.

BR, Martin

@Filipe_Magalhaes
That is indeed the service I'm looking for! Thanks a lot for your help much appreciated

entry.title: Re: Error when performing Inventory Transfer
entry.content:
You cannot use this to transfer between two branches before FP 2411.

You should use the Copy From and Copy To options for branch to branch inventory.

  • Moving Inventory from Branch to Branch

entry.title: Re: SAP NW JAVA Support Tool
entry.content:
Hi @roy_wu1 

we are trying to get the Netweaver Support Tool working without OracleJDK.

We tried already OpenJDK, SAPMaschine11 and openwebstart. 

 

You mentioned SAPJVM8. Is the Netweaver Support Tool supported by the SAPJVM8?

 

BR

Tobias

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI IP Ranges for Cloud Foundry Environment
entry.content: To allow SCC to connect to BTP, it needs to have access to the hosts listed in the Network section of the Prerequisites according to your region. i.e., the IP allow-listing mechanism (Firewall, proxy, etc.) on the Cloud Connector server should allow outbound (to BTP) traffic towards the listed host / IP addresses in the document. The port number is 443. There is no need to open port in the firewall for inbound (from BTP) requests.

entry.title: Re: How to search within specific object type (or other a...
entry.content: Check this blog: Searching Development Objects with the ABAP Object Search or online help: Property Filter.

entry.title: Re: Inventory Posting in SAP Business One SDK
entry.content:
Hi @ANKIT_CHAUHAN,

I can confirm that CountTime needs to be set if you want it to be specific. If left out, the time will be the moment you run the code. The screenshot below shows the time when I ran the code (red), and the time that I set specifically (green). The Count Date is correct in both cases.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Set-up EDI connection - 2EL and 4A1
entry.content:
Hello,

 

The client wants to set up an EDI connection. We found 2 scope items that can do so, namely 2EL ( Integration of Sales with External Buyers )  and 4A1 (Automation of Order-to-Invoice with SAP Business Network ).  The difference is that scope item 4A1 uses SAP Business Network, while 2EL does not use this.

In the set-up guide of 2EL it is mentioned to create communication scenario SAP_COM_0223. However, in the set-up guide of 4A1 it is mentioned that 'This procedure describes how to deactivate the Sales with Buyers Integration (SAP_COM_0223) communication arrangement in order to set up the Sales with SAP Business Network Integration (SAP_COM_0848) communication arrangement instead.'.

However, some customers of the client have a connection to SAP Business Network, while other customers of the client do not have this. This result in the issue that we want both scope items to run. Is this possible? Or is it only possible to have 1 of the 2 scope items running at the same time?

entry.title: Set-up EDI connection - 2EL and 4A1
entry.content:
Hello,

The client wants to set up an EDI connection. We found 2 scope items that can do so, namely 2EL ( Integration of Sales with External Buyers )  and 4A1 (Automation of Order-to-Invoice with SAP Business Network ).  The difference is that scope item 4A1 uses SAP Business Network, while 2EL does not use this.

In the set-up guide of 2EL it is mentioned to create communication scenario SAP_COM_0223. However, in the set-up guide of 4A1 it is mentioned that 'This procedure describes how to deactivate the Sales with Buyers Integration (SAP_COM_0223) communication arrangement in order to set up the Sales with SAP Business Network Integration (SAP_COM_0848) communication arrangement instead.'.

However, some customers of the client have a connection to SAP Business Network, while other customers of the client do not have this. This result in the issue that we want both scope items to run. Is this possible? Or is it only possible to have 1 of the 2 scope items running at the same time?

Please advise .

Thank you 

BM

entry.content: No, we left it as is and just made the order of cc's in a way that everyone will get notification

entry.title: Re: Can we hide or disable Self-description (introductory...
entry.content:
Hello @Karen17 ,

It looks like its not possible to achieve this feature at the moment. I tried myself as well. While doing some research I found out that there has been an enhancement request already raised for this requirement:

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/342655

I voted for this as well. Make sure you do vote. Fingers crossed to see this feature in the product soon.

Regardsm

Surya

entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are unable to find the K758016CPSAPBASIS.SAR file in software downloads. We are upgrading our DR0 system to SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS 02 (10/2024) after uploading the stack xml SUM is asking to upload the K758016CPSAPBASIS.SAR file for which we can"t find in software downloads. Could you please check and help us on this.

 

Regards,

Vikranth.

but I can't find the property for short text.

entry.title: Re: Call for Speakers (SIT DFW) - spring 2025
entry.content:
Hi Sergio,

I hope you're doing well.

Looking forward to your response. Apologies for any inconvenience.

Thank you   🙂 

Best regards,
Sravya

entry.title: FICO: Historical Foreign Currency Trial Balance
entry.content:
Hi,

Does anyone know a way to run a historical Foreign Currency Trial Balance.  That is the original document currency amounts with the Local Currency Amounts based on the original transactional rate.  I don't want to convert the foreign currency amounts using a rate, I need the balances based on the original rates.  Also, for BILCO accounts I need the original foreign currency values.  This TB should equal the values that are picked up by the Revaluation program.

@DequanXu

Hi DequanXu！

Thank you for your answer.

When I select Scenario with "External API",
I cannot select View "I_CustMgmtPartner".

Soma

entry.title: SAP Fiori development newsletter March 2025 (issue #33)
entry.content:
AI-assisted application development continues to be a big focus for SAP. Some of the prototypes we have been working on over the past several months are now part of our released software. We are seeing new innovations that blur the lines between no-code, low-code, and pro-code. This issue also has articles on the fundamentals: Excel, table controls, and CAP.

For ongoing updates, I encourage you to join our monthly SAP Fiori development roundtable. You can meet online with fellow developers and the SAP engineers who build our professional development tools. Register online or email me for an invitation. Our next meeting is Wednesday, February 12, 2025. 

If you prefer to receive this in your inbox, please subscribe to the SAP Fiori development newsletter.

Development News

Overview of all GenAI options in SAP Build Code

SAP Build Code includes many GenAI capabilities through Joule. This blog post summarizes the current features, discusses the variety of use cases they support, and provides recommendations that are specific to the new functionality.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/overview-of-all-genai-options-in-sap-build-code/ba-p/13984474

UI design and technology for web and mobile

This post covers how to build Joule agents, how AI makes it easier to develop UIs, for both SAP Fiori elements and SAP UI5 freestyle apps, and how to create an entire application from a sketch: data models in the backend, services, and the UI. Beyond AI, it discusses updates for web and mobile UI design and development.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-user-experience-q1-2025-update-part-7-ui-design-and-technology-for-web/ba-p/14034290

Simple table maintenance in SAP Fiori using UI5 Smart Controls

Switching from the “classic” SAP GUI table maintenance to an SAP Fiori-based solution doesn’t have to be complex. By using a CAP or RAP Backend, a freestyle UI5 app, and OData V2 (plus UI annotations), you can quickly set up a user-friendly, fully responsive table maintenance application.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/simple-table-maintenance-in-sap-fiori-using-ui5-smart-controls/ba-p/14014547

Visualizing your SAP bill of materials using CAP, SAP Fiori elements, and the UI5 network graph

This post demonstrates how to create a simple Bill of Materials (BOM) relationship visualization using SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) and consume it in an SAP Fiori elements application. It explains how to display the BOM structure as a Network Graph, making it easy for end users to navigate parent/child relationships among materials.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/visualizing-your-sap-bill-of-materials-using-cap-fiori-elements-and-the-ui5/ba-p/14025612

Deprecation of karma-ui5 plugin

SAPUI5 provides many testing options, such as unit and integration tests, which are summarized in UI5 Testing. As the Karma test runner is deprecated since April 2023, the UI5 team now has to deprecate karma-ui5.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/deprecation-of-karma-ui5-plugin/ba-p/13954060

SAP Build Code updates

SAP Build Code continues to evolve with improvements to RFCs, inline editing capability for CDS entities, and much more. Read about the latest updates.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/product-updates-for-sap-build-code-january-2025-edition/ba-p/13993021

AI is NOT invited to our meetings (friendly reminder)

In our monthly SAP development roundtable several people have been recording our calls and generating AI summaries. We have received complaints. Going forward, we ask that you don’t do this. Our goal is for everyone to share openly. Having a recording and/or transcript might prevent this. If we demo something new and exciting, we’ll create a recording to share. Otherwise, please do not invite your AI or chatbot to join. People only!

Events

SAP Fiori Innovation Day Silicon Valley recap

SAP Fiori Innovation Day in Silicon Valley was an exciting day of learning, networking, demos, food, and fun. Read about what you missed. Hope you can join us next time.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-fiori-innovation-day-in-silicon-valley-highlighted-how-ai-makes-app/ba-p/14011083

We are planning more SAP Fiori Innovation Day events in 2025

Most likely locations are Brno, Dallas, and maybe Paris. We'll have details in this newsletter when we finalize the dates and open the registration page.

 

Back issues from the past year

SAP Fiori development newsletter January 2025 (issue #32)

SAP Fiori development newsletter November 2024 (issue #31)

SAP Fiori development newsletter September 2024 (issue #30)

SAP Fiori development newsletter July 2024 (issue #29)

SAP FIori development newsletter May 2024 (issue #28)

SAP Fiori development newsletter March 2024 (issue #27)

entry.title: Re: SAP EBS: Question on Interpretation Algorithm "20 020: Document Number Search"
entry.content: Hi Vassili, My suspicion: In the system 1 (with same accounts), the clearing does not work by number but by amount. Could you please check the entries in table FEBCL for one of the successful posted bank statement items in system 1? What is the entry for SELFD? Is it a reference field or an amount? Best Regards, Joerg Rolapp

entry.title: Re: B1SLayer: A clean and easy way to consume SAP Business One Service Layer with .NET
entry.content:
@Bình @jtregue @phongtq @PeterArt @MUCHIRAJUNIOR @Dániel @uk101man @waragon878 @valter_brito @adaroy @Luk77909 

Hey, everyone. Sorry for not responding here earlier! Ever since the platform migration for the blogging content, I haven't been receiving notifications about new comments on my post.

If you have any suggestions, questions, or issues regarding B1SLayer and want to make sure I see them, please create a new issue on GitHub, and I'll respond there as soon as possible. Also, when creating the issue, please provide as much detail as you can—it really helps. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Import multiple bpmn to SAP Signavio
entry.content: So the answer is I have to import files one by one 🙂

entry.title: MRP Run Configuration
entry.content:
Hey guys, 

I need to know if its possible to configure the MRP Run in a way that it checks all requirements in an range between today and delivery date and just orders what is needed in that time range? 

At the moment it is just checking week by week and if something has negativ stock it creates an purchase requistion for it, but this leads to on overstock if there is already an order placed which fulfills everything. 

Hope somebody can help me.

entry.title: Re: CIM- Unable to submit invoices SCIM, system is showin...
entry.content: Hi @Manish_12 Discoverer,

entry.title: Re: CIM- Unable to submit invoices SCIM, system is showing error message a technical error occurred.
entry.content: Hi @Manish_12, I'm also getting the same issue. could you please help me if the issue is fixed

entry.title: Automatic Invoice creation for EWM related Deliveries
entry.content:
Backend System – SAP S/4HANA 2020FP02

Overview  -

This blog offers comprehensive guidance on implementing automatic invoicing for scenarios related to Extended Warehouse Management (EWM).

Business Scenario

Initially, the business was using storage location-based stock management, incorporating automatic invoicing through a custom solution at the point of goods issue for the delivery document. However, with the implementation of Extended Warehouse Management (EWM), this enhancement extension failed to function as intended, hence, the real-time invoice creation process was interrupted. We were unable to identify an appropriate user exit to implement this enhancement. Consequently, the Goods Issue status of the delivery was not completed when the existing enhancement for the invoice creation program was executed, resulting in the failure of invoice creation.

The VF04 background schedule was proposed to the business. However, the business did not agree due to potential delays in invoice creation and the need to identify the invoice creator as the same user who performed the PGI. Using VF04 would result in the invoice creator being marked as the background user.

 

 

Step 1

In order to maintain output condition records based on the warehouse number, it is essential to include the LGNUM-ERP warehouse in the delivery output field catalog. Once this field is added, it will be available for creating a condition table and subsequently included in an access sequence. This enhancement ensures that the solution is restricted to Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) locations.

 

  1. Include field ZZLGNUM in communication structure KOMKBV2. This structure contains an Include that is provided for additional fields. Add the field with the name ZZLGNUM in Include KOMKBZ4.
  2. In structure KOMB in Include KOMBZ, you have to add the same field (same procedure as for item 1).
  3. In view V_T681F, you must create the same field with transaction SM31 under key B V2.
  4. 4. Program LVCOMU04 contains Perform USEREXIT_KOMKBV2_FILL. This Perform is in program RVCOMFZZ.
  5.  Modify the source code as follows: 

 

FORM_USEREXIT_KOMKBV2_FILL.

COM_KBV2-ZZLGNUM = COM_LIKP-LGNUM.

ENDFORM.

 

Step 2

 

Create an output condition table utilizing the Delivery Type and Warehouse Number (ZZLGNUM).

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Step 3

 

Create an access sequence using the previously created table to assign it to the condition type.

 

 

 

 

Step 4

Delivery Output Condition type creation.

 

 

Program – /SPE/DLV_IBGI_PROCESSING

Form Routine – ENTRY

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Step 5

 

Create a requirement to be used for the delivery output determination procedure.

Go to VOFM -> Requirements -> Output control

 

Create a new routine copying routine 1 code and add a wait for 2 seconds. This wait will make sure that the delivery is completed before the invoice is created. Otherwise, the invoice will be shown in the document flow before the PGI entry.

 

 

 

Maintain the Application as ‘V2’ and activate the routine.

 

Run the ‘RV80HGEN’ program using the SE38 transaction to activate the routine.

 

Note: This is client-specific activation.

 

 

Step 6

 

Create a new Output determination procedure with the newly created output type.

 

 

 

 

 

Assign the created requirement 901 to the procedure. This routine assignment ensures that invoice creation is delayed until after the PGI entry is created. It will make sure that the output type is assigned to the delivery only after the PGI is completed, preventing invoice generation from happening before the PGI entry.

 

 

Step 7

Assign the delivery output procedure to the Delivery type.

 

 

 

 

 

Step 8

 

Output condition maintain

Go to VV21 in order to maintain the output condition for the ZREA output type.

 

 

 

 

 

 

Output type ZREA will be available after the Goods Issue has been posted. Consequently, the invoice related to the post-goods issue will be created automatically.

 

Conclusion –

This configuration and the developments will ensure that invoice creation will be automated without major customization for the SAP standard solution.

 

Special thanks to the Altria Consulting team @Kalana_Chathuranga_Herath, @HasiniTW, @Nilupul_Rambukwelle, @Dushan_Sasmitha and @Ravindu_Herath.
